channel.title: AI News Digest by Alex Chen (English)
channel.description: Daily AI industry news digest covering Anthropic, OpenAI, and other major players, with in-depth analysis from veteran tech journalist Alex Chen.

item.title: AI Industry Daily - March 22, 2026
item.description: OpenAI's acquisition of Astral isn't just a deal—it's a signal that AI companies are extending into developer infrastructure. As model capabilities converge, ecosystems become the new battleground.
